<!DOCTYPE html>

<html class="dark" lang="pt-BR"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Golden AI | A Nova Era da Inteligência Artificial</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@200;300;400;500;600;700;800&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        "primary": "#e0b629",
                        "brand-green": "#1B2412",
                        "brand-green-light": "#2a361e",
                        "background-light": "#fdfcf9",
                        "background-dark": "#131a0d",
                        "olive-glass": "rgba(27, 36, 18, 0.85)",
                    },
                    fontFamily: {
                        "display": ["Manrope", "sans-serif"]
                    },
                    borderRadius: {"DEFAULT": "0.5rem", "lg": "1rem", "xl": "1.5rem", "full": "9999px"},
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
<style>
        .glass-card {
            background: rgba(224, 182, 41, 0.04);
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(224, 182, 41, 0.15);
        }
        .gold-gradient-text {
            background: linear-gradient(to right, #e0b629, #fff7ad, #e0b629);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
        }
        .hero-mesh {
            background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(224, 182, 41, 0.1) 0%, rgba(27, 36, 18, 1) 100%);
        }
        .green-gradient-bg {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1B2412 0%, #0d1208 100%);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-background-light dark:bg-brand-green font-display text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100 overflow-x-hidden">
<!-- Top Navigation -->
<header class="fixed top-0 w-full z-50 border-b border-primary/10 bg-olive-glass backdrop-blur-md">
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 h-20 flex items-center justify-between">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3">
<img alt="Golden AI Logo" class="h-10 w-auto rounded-lg" data-purpose="logo" src="data:image/png;base64,"/>
<span class="text-xl font-bold tracking-tight gold-gradient-text">Golden AI</span>
</div>
<nav class="hidden md:flex items-center gap-8">
<a class="text-sm font-medium hover:text-primary transition-colors text-slate-200" href="#solucoes">Soluções</a>
<a class="text-sm font-medium hover:text-primary transition-colors text-slate-200" href="#manifesto">Manifesto</a>
<a class="text-sm font-medium hover:text-primary transition-colors text-slate-200" href="#como-funciona">Como Funciona</a>
<a class="text-sm font-medium hover:text-primary transition-colors text-slate-200" href="#contato">Contato</a>
</nav>
<button class="bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-brand-green px-6 py-2.5 rounded-full text-sm font-bold transition-all shadow-lg shadow-primary/20">
            Agendar Demo
        </button>
</div>
</header>
<main>
<!-- Hero Section -->
<section class="relative min-h-screen flex items-center pt-20 hero-mesh">
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center">
<div class="flex flex-col gap-8">
<div class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-primary/30 bg-primary/5 w-fit">
<span class="relative flex h-2 w-2">
<span class="animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-primary opacity-75"></span>
<span class="relative inline-flex rounded-full h-2 w-2 bg-primary"></span>
</span>
<span class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest font-bold text-primary">A Nova Era Começou</span>
</div>
<h1 class="text-5xl md:text-7xl font-extrabold leading-[1.1] tracking-tight text-white">
                    Toda grande história tem suas <span class="gold-gradient-text">eras.</span> Agora é a era da IA.
                </h1>
<p class="text-lg text-slate-300 max-w-xl leading-relaxed">
                    A Golden AI implementa automação humanizada para atendimento e processos, levando sua empresa para o ápice da inteligência artificial aplicada ao lucro.
                </p>
<div class="flex flex-wrap gap-4">
<button class="bg-primary text-brand-green h-14 px-8 rounded-xl font-bold text-lg hover:scale-105 transition-transform flex items-center gap-2 shadow-xl shadow-primary/10">
                        Agendar uma demonstração
                        <span class="material-symbols-outlined">arrow_forward</span>
</button>
<button class="border border-primary/50 text-primary h-14 px-8 rounded-xl font-bold text-lg hover:bg-primary/5 transition-all">
                        Conhecer soluções
                    </button>
</div>
</div>
<div class="relative group">
<div class="absolute -inset-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary/30 to-transparent rounded-xl blur-2xl opacity-40"></div>
<div class="relative bg-brand-green-light rounded-2xl border border-primary/20 overflow-hidden shadow-2xl">
<img alt="AI Visualization" class="w-full h-full object-cover opacity-90 mix-blend-luminosity hover:mix-blend-normal transition-all duration-700" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuArRA95wWZzQ5pCTftzwIaWdkXBfwCq8hzGdLsY5bPEgy8kTsEaPXjRLTP51iVbxzxdkexiYVDQFrG3ybeijuQ12jcoyJPMHZVo1-nkypXcHRQHRflEjzSZOJHUuH7Hi-_pHc9JFJj7E4hIwP4AZAdCSOUPREr5cqwBS4wMmwmdZVT8gzo8DCeQPLu6LcRtcRSPuFYMxyLkXh9C6mIi6wDD7SCStppRT6OqTrkmbxRGPRhtTDIoeZzaWhULsmSDtA9IWYmpUbICQBS3"/>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Manifesto/Timeline Section -->
<section class="py-24 bg-brand-green border-y border-primary/10" id="manifesto">
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6">
<div class="text-center mb-20">
<h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold mb-4 text-white">A Evolução das Eras</h2>
<p class="text-slate-400 max-w-2xl mx-auto">Estamos entrando em uma nova era. A Golden AI é o seu portal para a inteligência absoluta nos negócios.</p>
</div>
<div class="relative">
<div class="absolute top-1/2 left-0 w-full h-px bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-primary/30 to-transparent hidden lg:block"></div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
<!-- Eras -->
<div class="flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-4 relative">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-brand-green-light border border-primary/20 flex items-center justify-center text-primary z-10">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">fitness_center</span>
</div>
<h3 class="font-bold text-xl text-slate-100">Era da Força</h3>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-500">O início do trabalho manual e a força bruta como motor.</p>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-4 relative">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-brand-green-light border border-primary/20 flex items-center justify-center text-primary z-10">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">factory</span>
</div>
<h3 class="font-bold text-xl text-slate-100">Era Industrial</h3>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-500">A revolução das máquinas e a produção em massa escalável.</p>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-4 relative">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-brand-green-light border border-primary/20 flex items-center justify-center text-primary z-10">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">language</span>
</div>
<h3 class="font-bold text-xl text-slate-100">Era da Informação</h3>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-500">A conectividade global e o surgimento do digital.</p>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-4 relative">
<div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-primary border border-primary/50 flex items-center justify-center text-brand-green z-10 shadow-lg shadow-primary/40">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">auto_awesome</span>
</div>
<h3 class="font-bold text-xl gold-gradient-text">Era da IA</h3>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-300 font-medium">Onde a Golden AI transforma dados em ação inteligente.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Solutions Cards -->
<section class="py-24 bg-brand-green/40" id="solucoes">
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6">
<div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-end justify-between mb-16 gap-6">
<div>
<h2 class="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-bold mb-4 text-white">Arquitetura de Soluções</h2>
<p class="text-slate-400">Tecnologia de ponta para cada etapa da sua operação.</p>
</div>
<div class="h-px flex-1 bg-primary/10 mx-8 hidden md:block"></div>
<span class="text-primary font-mono tracking-widest">SOLUTIONS.V2</span>
</div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
<!-- Card 1 -->
<div class="glass-card p-8 rounded-2xl group hover:border-primary/40 transition-all duration-500">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl text-primary mb-6">forum</span>
<h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-3 text-slate-100">Atendimento Humanizado</h3>
<p class="text-slate-400 leading-relaxed">IAs treinadas com o tom de voz da sua marca para interações naturais e resolutivas 24/7.</p>
</div>
<!-- Card 2 -->
<div class="glass-card p-8 rounded-2xl group hover:border-primary/40 transition-all duration-500">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl text-primary mb-6">account_tree</span>
<h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-3 text-slate-100">Processos Internos</h3>
<p class="text-slate-400 leading-relaxed">Automação de fluxos repetitivos, gestão de documentos e triagem inteligente de dados.</p>
</div>
<!-- Card 3 -->
<div class="glass-card p-8 rounded-2xl group hover:border-primary/40 transition-all duration-500">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl text-primary mb-6">person_search</span>
<h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-3 text-slate-100">Qualificação de Leads</h3>
<p class="text-slate-400 leading-relaxed">Filtre leads em tempo real com critérios avançados antes de chegarem ao seu time comercial.</p>
</div>
<!-- Card 4 -->
<div class="glass-card p-8 rounded-2xl group hover:border-primary/40 transition-all duration-500">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl text-primary mb-6">sync</span>
<h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-3 text-slate-100">Follow-up Automático</h3>
<p class="text-slate-400 leading-relaxed">Nutrição inteligente de clientes que nunca deixa uma oportunidade esfriar na caixa de entrada.</p>
</div>
<!-- Card 5 -->
<div class="glass-card p-8 rounded-2xl group hover:border-primary/40 transition-all duration-500">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl text-primary mb-6">hub</span>
<h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-3 text-slate-100">Integrações Inteligentes</h3>
<p class="text-slate-400 leading-relaxed">Conectamos nossa IA nativamente com seu CRM, ERP e ferramentas de comunicação favoritas.</p>
</div>
<!-- Card 6 -->
<div class="bg-primary/5 p-8 rounded-2xl border border-primary/20 flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center hover:bg-primary/10 transition-colors">
<h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-4 text-slate-100">Sua solução customizada</h3>
<p class="text-slate-400 mb-6">Desenvolvemos fluxos exclusivos para o seu desafio específico.</p>
<a class="text-primary font-bold flex items-center gap-2 hover:underline" href="#">
                        Falar com especialista
                        <span class="material-symbols-outlined">trending_flat</span>
</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Benefits Section -->
<section class="py-24 overflow-hidden bg-brand-green">
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6">
<div class="grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-16 items-center">
<div class="relative">
<div class="absolute -top-10 -left-10 w-40 h-40 bg-primary/20 blur-[80px]"></div>
<h2 class="text-4xl font-bold mb-12 text-white">Por que a Golden AI?</h2>
<div class="space-y-8">
<div class="flex gap-6">
<div class="shrink-0 w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-primary/10 border border-primary/20 flex items-center justify-center text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">schedule</span>
</div>
<div>
<h4 class="font-bold text-lg mb-1 text-slate-100">Respostas Imediatas 24/7</h4>
<p class="text-slate-400">Nunca perca um cliente por demora no atendimento. Sua empresa sempre ativa.</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex gap-6">
<div class="shrink-0 w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-primary/10 border border-primary/20 flex items-center justify-center text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">rocket_launch</span>
</div>
<div>
<h4 class="font-bold text-lg mb-1 text-slate-100">Aumento de Produtividade</h4>
<p class="text-slate-400">Libere seu time para tarefas criativas enquanto a IA cuida do repetitivo.</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex gap-6">
<div class="shrink-0 w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-primary/10 border border-primary/20 flex items-center justify-center text-primary">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">trending_up</span>
</div>
<div>
<h4 class="font-bold text-lg mb-1 text-slate-100">Escalabilidade Infinita</h4>
<p class="text-slate-400">Atenda 10 ou 10.000 pessoas simultaneamente com a mesma excelência.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="relative h-[500px] rounded-3xl overflow-hidden border border-primary/10 shadow-2xl">
<img alt="Technology background" class="w-full h-full object-cover grayscale opacity-40" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDofuG8Y9C-GINlOYc3ghKJqKMHMgPjO5whEN0muOE_i9HkEggHX8vCR_Jh39YouHNyRWOOlt8nrD3SO3L35p9edy-1ihEWse25jCxscCH1p6Q5NrnyayGYOxJtS0jSbScA0aPtu_CLkXJu3qrfV5ndQNjFWxKbmtUqxLISP_0eBuWxseH33_xINJijUOsxPQXc7BbDL_q2YkDsar1PV2jVE6XcdXUXoBnL0ZAlVnPZN3ej_bUDg7rVQLqvs9svnquzltUVBy-zpJqt"/>
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-brand-green via-transparent to-transparent"></div>
<div class="absolute bottom-8 left-8 right-8 glass-card p-6 rounded-xl border-l-4 border-l-primary">
<p class="text-slate-100 italic">"A implementação da Golden AI reduziu nosso tempo de resposta de 4 horas para 15 segundos."</p>
<p class="text-primary font-bold mt-4 text-sm">— CEO, TechVision Global</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- How it Works (Steps) -->
<section class="py-24 bg-brand-green/80" id="como-funciona">
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6">
<div class="text-center mb-16">
<h2 class="text-3xl font-bold mb-4 text-white">Metodologia Golden</h2>
<p class="text-slate-400">Como levamos sua empresa para a nova era</p>
</div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
<div class="relative flex flex-col items-center text-center group">
<div class="text-5xl font-black text-primary/10 absolute -top-10 group-hover:text-primary/20 transition-colors">01</div>
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl bg-brand-green-light border border-primary/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-6 text-primary shadow-xl">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">analytics</span>
</div>
<h4 class="font-bold text-lg mb-2 text-slate-100">Diagnóstico</h4>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-500">Analisamos seus gargalos e oportunidades de automação.</p>
</div>
<div class="relative flex flex-col items-center text-center group">
<div class="text-5xl font-black text-primary/10 absolute -top-10 group-hover:text-primary/20 transition-colors">02</div>
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl bg-brand-green-light border border-primary/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-6 text-primary shadow-xl">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">architecture</span>
</div>
<h4 class="font-bold text-lg mb-2 text-slate-100">Desenho</h4>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-500">Projetamos os fluxos e treinamos a IA com seus dados.</p>
</div>
<div class="relative flex flex-col items-center text-center group">
<div class="text-5xl font-black text-primary/10 absolute -top-10 group-hover:text-primary/20 transition-colors">03</div>
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl bg-brand-green-light border border-primary/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-6 text-primary shadow-xl">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">rocket</span>
</div>
<h4 class="font-bold text-lg mb-2 text-slate-100">Implementação</h4>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-500">Colocamos a IA para rodar integrada aos seus sistemas.</p>
</div>
<div class="relative flex flex-col items-center text-center group">
<div class="text-5xl font-black text-primary/10 absolute -top-10 group-hover:text-primary/20 transition-colors">04</div>
<div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl bg-brand-green-light border border-primary/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-6 text-primary shadow-xl">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined">query_stats</span>
</div>
<h4 class="font-bold text-lg mb-2 text-slate-100">Otimização</h4>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-500">Monitoramos e evoluímos os resultados continuamente.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<!-- Final CTA Section -->
<section class="py-24 bg-brand-green" id="contato">
<div class="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-6">
<div class="relative bg-gradient-to-br from-brand-green-light to-black p-12 md:p-20 rounded-[2rem] border border-primary/20 overflow-hidden text-center">
<div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-64 h-64 bg-primary/10 blur-[100px] -mr-32 -mt-32"></div>
<div class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-64 h-64 bg-primary/10 blur-[100px] -ml-32 -mb-32"></div>
<h2 class="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold mb-8 leading-tight text-white">
                    Pronto para liderar a <br/> <span class="gold-gradient-text">Nova Era</span> dos negócios?
                </h2>
<p class="text-slate-300 text-lg mb-10 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
                    Não deixe sua empresa presa no passado. Agende uma consultoria estratégica gratuita e descubra o poder da Golden AI.
                </p>
<div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-center gap-4">
<button class="bg-primary text-brand-green h-14 px-10 rounded-xl font-bold text-lg hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-primary/40 transition-all">
                        Agendar Demonstração Grátis
                    </button>
<button class="border border-slate-700 text-slate-300 h-14 px-10 rounded-xl font-bold text-lg hover:bg-slate-800 transition-all">
                        Falar com Consultor
                    </button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
</main>
<!-- Footer -->
<footer class="bg-brand-green border-t border-primary/10 pt-20 pb-10">
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6">
<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-12 mb-20">
<div class="col-span-1 md:col-span-1">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
<img alt="Logo" class="h-8 rounded" src="data:image/png;base64,"/>
<span class="text-lg font-bold gold-gradient-text">Golden AI</span>
</div>
<p class="text-slate-500 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                    Liderando a revolução da inteligência artificial aplicada aos negócios com sofisticação e resultados tangíveis.
                </p>
</div>
<div>
<h5 class="font-bold mb-6 text-slate-200">Plataforma</h5>
<ul class="space-y-4 text-sm text-slate-500">
<li><a class="hover:text-primary transition-colors" href="#">Atendimento</a></li>
<li><a class="hover:text-primary transition-colors" href="#">Processos</a></li>
<li><a class="hover:text-primary transition-colors" href="#">CRM Sync</a></li>
<li><a class="hover:text-primary transition-colors" href="#">Enterprise</a></li>
</ul>
</div>
<div>
<h5 class="font-bold mb-6 text-slate-200">Empresa</h5>
<ul class="space-y-4 text-sm text-slate-500">
<li><a class="hover:text-primary transition-colors" href="#">Sobre Nós</a></li>
<li><a class="hover:text-primary transition-colors" href="#">Manifesto</a></li>
<li><a class="hover:text-primary transition-colors" href="#">Carreiras</a></li>
<li><a class="hover:text-primary transition-colors" href="#">Blog</a></li>
</ul>
</div>
<div>
<h5 class="font-bold mb-6 text-slate-200">Newsletter</h5>
<p class="text-sm text-slate-500 mb-4">Assine para receber insights sobre IA.</p>
<div class="flex gap-2">
<input class="bg-brand-green-light border border-primary/20 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm w-full focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none text-white" placeholder="Seu email" type="email"/>
<button class="bg-primary text-brand-green p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors">
<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-sm">send</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="border-t border-primary/5 pt-8 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4 text-xs text-slate-600">
<p>© 2024 Golden AI. Todos os direitos reservados.</p>
<div class="flex gap-8">
<a class="hover:text-slate-400" href="#">Termos de Uso</a>
<a class="hover:text-slate-400" href="#">Privacidade</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</footer>
</body></html>
